logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: Correction "illegal immigrant" would be the better term to reference.  The main distinction being the lack of official social contract between the illegal immigrant and the country they reside in.

logs.name: staff-judy
logs.text: Do you believe that financial aid should be given to other individuals who also didn't pay taxes but happen to be in the country lawfully? You're conclusion "my parents' tax dollars shouldn't go towards subsidizing a private school for the son/daughter of an immigrant that never paid a dime in taxes." emphasizes **immigrant** as your qualifier. From a rational/logical viewpoint why is that the qualifier?

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "I completely disagree with you, @staff-judy. The term 'illegal immigrant' is not only more accurate, but it's also a matter of national security. If someone is living in our country without going through the proper channels, they're not contributing to the system and shouldn't be entitled to the same benefits as citizens. I don't think it's fair to use my parents' tax dollars to support someone who's essentially a lawbreaker. And by the way, it's not just about the taxes, it's about the principle of the matter. If we start giving financial aid to people who didn't pay taxes, where do we draw the line? It's not just about the immigrant status, it's about the fact that they're not following the rules."

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @chromatic-send? You're still stuck on the 'illegal immigrant' label. That's not the issue here. The issue is that my parents paid their taxes, but I'm still expected to foot the bill for someone who broke the law to get here. It's not about national security, it's about basic fairness. And by the way, just because someone didn't pay taxes doesn't mean they're not contributing to society. They're still human beings with families and dreams, just like everyone else. Can we please focus on the actual issue here?"

logs.name: undirected-island
logs.text: "Are you both having a laugh? @chromatic-send, you're completely missing the point. It's not about national security, it's about basic human decency. If someone's willing to break the law to come here, they should be willing to follow the rules. And @undirected-photon, I understand where you're coming from, but 'basic fairness' isn't just about the person's human rights, it's about the system's integrity. If we start giving financial aid to people who broke the law, we're undermining the entire system. It's not just about the taxes, it's about the principle of the matter. And by the way, I'm not saying they shouldn't get any help, just not at the expense of people who followed the rules."

logs.name: staff-judy
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @undirected-island? You're still spewing the same nonsense about 'basic human decency' and'system's integrity'. Newsflash: the system is already broken, and we're the ones who are supposed to fix it. And by the way, I'm not saying that people who break the law shouldn't get any help, I'm saying they shouldn't get the same benefits as citizens who followed the law. It's not that hard to understand. And @undirected-photon, I'm not missing the point, I'm just stating the obvious. If someone is willing to break the law to come here, they should be willing to follow the rules. Period."

logs.name: undirected-island
logs.text: "Are you seriously trying to justify taking away someone's rights because they broke the law? @staff-judy, your 'newsflash' is just a bunch of nonsense. You're not fixing the system, you're just making it worse. And by the way, 'it's not that hard to understand' is just a cop-out. You're not even trying to have a real conversation here. You're just spewing the same old rhetoric about 'following the rules' and'system's integrity'. Well, let me tell you, @staff-judy, that's not the issue. The issue is basic human decency and compassion. And I won't stand for you dismissing that."

logs.name: staff-judy
logs.text: "Are you done spewing your nonsense, @undirected-island? I'm not here to have a debate with someone who refuses to listen to reason. If you can't see the logic in following the rules, then maybe you shouldn't be here. I'm not going to engage in a conversation with someone who's clearly not interested in having a rational discussion. Next!"

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @staff-judy? You're just throwing away your own credibility by being so dismissive and condescending. Newsflash: you're not the only one who's interested in having a rational discussion. I'm trying to have a respectful conversation about the complexities of the issue, and you're just shutting it down with your 'logic' and'reason'. It's not about being 'interested' or not, it's about being willing to listen to opposing views and engage in a constructive dialogue. And by the way, @undirected-island, I think you're the one who's being unreasonable and close-minded. You're not even willing to consider the nuances of the issue, you're just stuck on your own dogmatic stance. Can't we have a civil conversation without resorting to personal attacks and insults?"

logs.name: glass-ray
logs.text: "Wow, @chromatic-send, you really think you're some kind of expert on civil conversations now? Newsflash, buddy, you're just as bad as @staff-judy, but at least she's not as whiny. 'Nuances of the issue'? Are you even kidding me? You're just spewing the same old liberal nonsense about 'compassion' and 'human decency'. Give me a break. And by the way, @staff-judy, I'm not being close-minded, I'm just not buying the emotional appeals. If you want to have a real discussion, let's talk about the actual facts, not just your feelings. Oh, and @chromatic-send, 'constructive dialogue'? Please, you're not even listening to me, you're just trying to lecture me on how to be a better person. Get over yourself."

logs.name: aquamarine-moscato
logs.text: "Are you two done with your little shouting match? Can't we just have a civil conversation without resorting to personal attacks and insults? I'm trying to discuss the topic at hand, not engage in a battle of wits. @chromatic-send, I'm not being close-minded, I'm just trying to present a different perspective. And @glass-ray, your 'facts' are just as subjective as everyone else's. Let's focus on the topic, shall we?"

logs.name: glass-ray
logs.text: "Wow, @aquamarine-moscato, you really think you're the mediator here? Newsflash, you're just enabling @chromatic-send's whiny behavior and @staff-judy's condescending attitude. You're not even trying to have a real discussion, you're just trying to shut us down with your 'let's focus on the topic' nonsense. And by the way, @chromatic-send, your 'different perspective' is just a fancy way of saying you have no idea what you're talking about. So, no, we're not done with this little shouting match, we're just getting started. Bring it on, @aquamarine-moscato, I'm ready for your weak attempts at mediation."

logs.name: staff-judy
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @glass-ray? You're the one who's being condescending and aggressive, not me. I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation and you're over here throwing insults and personal attacks. And @aquamarine-moscato, I think you're just enabling @glass-ray's behavior by not calling him out on his rudeness. Can't you see that he's not interested in having a real discussion?"

logs.name: mint-chateau
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this drama already? I just wanted to discuss the topic at hand, not get into a fight. @glass-ray, your insults aren't helping anyone and @staff-judy, I'm not enabling anyone, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. Can we please just focus on the topic?"

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @glass-ray? You're the one who's being completely out of line here. I was just trying to keep the conversation civil and you come at me with personal attacks. And @mint-chateau, I think you're just trying to avoid the real issue at hand. @glass-ray's behavior is exactly what's not acceptable in this community. Let's focus on the topic, not on attacking each other."

logs.name: mint-chateau
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this drama already? I just wanted to discuss the topic at hand, not get into a fight. Can we please just focus on the topic? @glass-ray, your insults aren't helping anyone and @staff-judy, I'm not enabling anyone, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. Can we please just move on from this personal attack?"

logs.name: aquamarine-moscato
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this back-and-forth already? Can't we just have a respectful discussion without resorting to personal attacks? @mint-chateau, I think you're right, we should focus on the topic at hand, not on each other's behavior. Let's keep the conversation civil and avoid insults. @glass-ray, I'm disappointed in your behavior, and I hope you can take a step back and reflect on your actions."
